title: viola × murbeckii
intro: Viola × murbeckii, also known as the hybrid violet, is a cross between the common violet (Viola sororia) and the downy violet (Viola selkirkii), a type of flowering plant in the violet family. The medicinal properties of Viola × murbeckii include its high content of flavonoids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. Viola × murbeckii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies and homeopathic treatments.
